scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-confirmed against the live docs page (https://wufoo.github.io/docs/, fetched 2026-07-04). Wufoo's v3 REST surface is small and entirely enumerated below: Forms, Form Fields, Entries (read + submit), Entries Count, Form Comments (+ count), Reports, Report Fields, Report Entries (+ count), Report Widgets, Users, Webhooks (add/delete only, no list), and Login. Every GET list/detail resource is now a stream; every dialect-expressible mutation (entry submission, webhook add/delete) is a writes.json action. Excluded endpoints are single-object detail duplicates of an already-covered list stream, non-data count endpoints, the Login call (session-cookie auth, not applicable to this connector's API-key auth model), and the Users list (account-admin data, not sync-relevant business data).

excluded.reason: single-form detail; identical record shape to the forms list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-scalar entry count, not a syncable object list
single-scalar comment count, not a syncable object list
single-report detail; identical record shape to the reports list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-scalar entry count for a report, not a syncable object list
account sub-user administration listing, not business form/entry data; requires account-owner-level API key scope distinct from a per-form key
session-cookie login flow for Wufoo's legacy widget/embed tooling; this connector authenticates every request with HTTP Basic api_key auth and never establishes a session
